{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations Assistant",
  "description": "Thyaura Partners Concept Limited is an ISO9001-2015 certified company driven by innovative technology, delivering outstanding integrated support services in Commercial and Residential Facility Management, Professional and Specialized Cleaning Services, Height Services and Equipment Leasing.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Responsibilities


	Assist in planning, scheduling, and coordinating daily operations across multiple service lines.
	Monitor field staff (cleaners, technicians, and supervisors) to ensure tasks are executed efficiently and according to company standards.
	Support deployment of teams for post-construction cleaning, fa&ccedil;ade cleaning, upholstery cleaning, plumbing, electrical, and janitorial assignments.
	Track attendance, site allocation, and workforce productivity.
	Liaise with clients to confirm job schedules, updates, and service feedback.
	Ensure availability and proper use of tools, equipment, and cleaning chemicals.
	Conduct site visits and inspections to ensure quality control and compliance with safety standards.
	Report operational issues, delays, or client concerns promptly to the Operations Manager.
	Maintain accurate records of jobs, materials used, and service reports.
	Assist in preparing operational reports and performance summaries.
	Support onboarding and basic training coordination for field staff.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, and environmental (HSE) policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 5-10 years of experience.




Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / Month.



Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hiring@thyaura.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-28",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-11",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Thyaura Limited"
    
  },

  },

      "minValue": 150000,
      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Operations Assistant Job at Thyaura Partners Concept Limited




        
    

        
        Thyaura Partners Concept Limited is an ISO9001-2015 certified company driven by innovative technology, delivering outstanding integrated support services in Commercial and Residential Facility Management, Professional and Specialized Cleaning Services, Height Services and Equipment Leasing.


We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operations Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Anthony, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time



Responsibilities


	Assist in planning, scheduling, and coordinating daily operations across multiple service lines.
	Monitor field staff (cleaners, technicians, and supervisors) to ensure tasks are executed efficiently and according to company standards.
	Support deployment of teams for post-construction cleaning, façade cleaning, upholstery cleaning, plumbing, electrical, and janitorial assignments.
	Track attendance, site allocation, and workforce productivity.
	Liaise with clients to confirm job schedules, updates, and service feedback.
	Ensure availability and proper use of tools, equipment, and cleaning chemicals.
	Conduct site visits and inspections to ensure quality control and compliance with safety standards.
	Report operational issues, delays, or client concerns promptly to the Operations Manager.
	Maintain accurate records of jobs, materials used, and service reports.
	Assist in preparing operational reports and performance summaries.
	Support onboarding and basic training coordination for field staff.
	Ensure adherence to health, safety, and environmental (HSE) policies.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 5-10 years of experience.




Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 / Month.



Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Software Engineering Manager",
  "description": "Cavista is a global technology company creating cloud-based software solutions for clients. With operations around the world, we globalize, standardize and localize our processes, while at the same time remaining sensitive to specific needs in different regions. Our mission is to empower organizations with the world&rsquo;s best technology solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Software Engineering Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ilupeju, Lagos

Job Description


	A&nbsp;Software Engineering Manager&nbsp;to lead, mentor and manage multiple agile teams comprised of software engineers, team leads and product managers.&nbsp;
	Strategic in developing initiatives and setting time tables for the evaluation, development, and deployment of all web-based services.&nbsp;
	This is a&nbsp;full-time, salaried role, based in Lagos, Nigeria.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Computer Science or any related field
	4+ years of combined experience in software engineering leadership; managing, architecting and deploying SaaS applications in a cloud-based infrastructure&nbsp;&nbsp;
	4+ years of experience utilizing agile development and scrum methodologies&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Scrum Master a plus (NOT required)&nbsp;&nbsp;
	1-3 years of experience building consumer web and mobile software solutions&nbsp;&nbsp;
	2-4 years of people management with demonstrated experience in building and motivating large teams&nbsp;&nbsp;
	An understanding of security issues facing SaaS platforms and effective mitigation&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Solid technical background with experience in building next generation architectures and solutions&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Strong organizational planning and development, business judgment, influential skills and technical leadership&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Ability to take part in code reviews, drive architecture, engage in design discussions and final solution selection&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Strong record in building high performing organizations through people development and empowered teams&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Experience with SaaS technologies and a track record of delivering high quality products&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Excel at leading, managing, and building high functioning teams; and leading front-line technical contributors&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Ability to foster alignment of values, missions, and operational best practices&nbsp;&nbsp;
	Outstanding communication, interpersonal and organizational skills.


What We Offer


	We offer a competitive compensation package (DOE), benefits and growth opportunities for everyone who joins Cavista.&nbsp;


Cavista Offers even more:


	Competitive Compensation&nbsp;
	5 - day workweek
	Casual Friday, Everyday
	20 PTO (Paid-Time-Off) Days + Holidays + Birthdays off
	Flextime
	Competitive Health Insurance (Employee + Spouse + 4 children)
	Accidental and Disability Benefit
	Retirement Benefit - Pensions
	Wellness Programs
	Game On! PS, Pool, Chess and more
	Genuine respect for work-life balance
	Employee Training Programs
	Professional Development for Career Growth
	Remote working and IT Assets provided for Remote employees
	Gratuity
	Mentoring and Counseling
	Referral Bonus
	Work from Anywhere - Flexibility that allows you to work where you are most comfortable, whether at home, at work, or a combination of both
	Respect and Collaborative team environment
	And so much more.&nbsp;
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-28",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-29",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Cavista"
    
  },

Software Engineering Manager Job at Cavista




        
    

        
        Cavista is a global technology company creating cloud-based software solutions for clients. With operations around the world, we globalize, standardize and localize our processes, while at the same time remaining sensitive to specific needs in different regions. Our mission is to empower organizations with the world’s best technology solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineering Manager

Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	A Software Engineering Manager to lead, mentor and manage multiple agile teams comprised of software engineers, team leads and product managers. 
	Strategic in developing initiatives and setting time tables for the evaluation, development, and deployment of all web-based services. 
	This is a full-time, salaried role, based in Lagos, Nigeria.


Qualifications


	Candidates should possess a Degree in Computer Science or any related field
	4+ years of combined experience in software engineering leadership; managing, architecting and deploying SaaS applications in a cloud-based infrastructure  
	4+ years of experience utilizing agile development and scrum methodologies  
	Scrum Master a plus (NOT required)  
	1-3 years of experience building consumer web and mobile software solutions  
	2-4 years of people management with demonstrated experience in building and motivating large teams  
	An understanding of security issues facing SaaS platforms and effective mitigation  
	Solid technical background with experience in building next generation architectures and solutions  
	Strong organizational planning and development, business judgment, influential skills and technical leadership  
	Ability to take part in code reviews, drive architecture, engage in design discussions and final solution selection  
	Strong record in building high performing organizations through people development and empowered teams  
	Experience with SaaS technologies and a track record of delivering high quality products  
	Excel at leading, managing, and building high functioning teams; and leading front-line technical contributors  
	Ability to foster alignment of values, missions, and operational best practices  
	Outstanding communication, interpersonal and organizational skills.


What We Offer


	We offer a competitive compensation package (DOE), benefits and growth opportunities for everyone who joins Cavista. 


Cavista Offers even more:


	Competitive Compensation 
	5 - day workweek
	Casual Friday, Everyday
	20 PTO (Paid-Time-Off) Days + Holidays + Birthdays off
	Flextime
	Competitive Health Insurance (Employee + Spouse + 4 children)
	Accidental and Disability Benefit
	Retirement Benefit - Pensions
	Wellness Programs
	Game On! PS, Pool, Chess and more
	Genuine respect for work-life balance
	Employee Training Programs
	Professional Development for Career Growth
	Remote working and IT Assets provided for Remote employees
	Gratuity
	Mentoring and Counseling
	Referral Bonus
	Work from Anywhere - Flexibility that allows you to work where you are most comfortable, whether at home, at work, or a combination of both
	Respect and Collaborative team environment
	And so much more. 
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Assistant (HR and Office)",
  "description": "Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant (HR and Office)

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Administrative Assistant will manage day-to-day office operations and provide basic support to the HR function.
	The role is primarily administrative, ensuring the office runs smoothly while assisting HR with simple coordination and documentation tasks.


Key Responsibilities
Office Administration (Primary Focus):


	Ensure the office is well-maintained and fully functional daily
	Monitor and manage office supplies (water, coffee, stationery, cleaning items, etc.)
	Track and restock supplies proactively
	Monitor electricity/internet availability and promptly escalate issues
	Coordinate with vendors (fuel, cleaning, repairs, etc.) as needed
	Maintain a clean, organized, and professional office environment
	Handle printing, photocopying, scanning, and document filing
	Support meeting setup and logistics


HR Support (Execution Only):


	Print, organize, and file employee documents
	Assist with onboarding logistics (document collation, welcome materials, coordination)
	Track completion of employee forms (biodata, contracts, etc.)
	Support document routing for signatures
	Maintain and update basic HR trackers (as instructed)
	Assist with timesheet collection and basic payroll documentation
	Help upload and organize files on SharePoint


Recruitment Coordination:


	Schedule interviews and coordinate with candidates
	Share interview details (time, venue, virtual links)
	Update candidate trackers as directed


What This Role Is NOT:


	Not responsible for creating HR policies or documents from scratch
	Not responsible for HR decision-making
	Not responsible for handling employee relations independently


Requirements


	0&ndash;2 years of experience in administrative or office support roles
	Strong organization and attention to detail
	Ability to follow instructions and execute tasks efficiently
	Good communication skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel)
	Must be reliable and onsite.


Salary
N100,000 / month (with training provided).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;avsabujahr@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Administrative Assistant (HR and Office)&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-20",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

    "@type": "Place",

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

  },

    "@type": "PropertyValue",

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {

      "minValue": 75000,
      "maxValue": 150000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

}



Administrative Assistant (HR and Office) Job at Avocado Virtual Solutions




        
    

        
        Avocado Virtual Solutions (AVS) is a professional recruitment agency and business support service dedicated to helping entrepreneurs, small businesses, and busy professionals streamline their operations. We specialize in administrative support, customer service, social media management, recruitment assistance with onboarding, and business/company branding. Our mission is to help clients save time, enhance productivity, and build strong, recognizable brands while they focus on growing their businesses.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant (HR and Office)

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Administrative Assistant will manage day-to-day office operations and provide basic support to the HR function.
	The role is primarily administrative, ensuring the office runs smoothly while assisting HR with simple coordination and documentation tasks.


Key Responsibilities
Office Administration (Primary Focus):


	Ensure the office is well-maintained and fully functional daily
	Monitor and manage office supplies (water, coffee, stationery, cleaning items, etc.)
	Track and restock supplies proactively
	Monitor electricity/internet availability and promptly escalate issues
	Coordinate with vendors (fuel, cleaning, repairs, etc.) as needed
	Maintain a clean, organized, and professional office environment
	Handle printing, photocopying, scanning, and document filing
	Support meeting setup and logistics


HR Support (Execution Only):


	Print, organize, and file employee documents
	Assist with onboarding logistics (document collation, welcome materials, coordination)
	Track completion of employee forms (biodata, contracts, etc.)
	Support document routing for signatures
	Maintain and update basic HR trackers (as instructed)
	Assist with timesheet collection and basic payroll documentation
	Help upload and organize files on SharePoint


Recruitment Coordination:


	Schedule interviews and coordinate with candidates
	Share interview details (time, venue, virtual links)
	Update candidate trackers as directed


What This Role Is NOT:


	Not responsible for creating HR policies or documents from scratch
	Not responsible for HR decision-making
	Not responsible for handling employee relations independently


Requirements


	0–2 years of experience in administrative or office support roles
	Strong organization and attention to detail
	Ability to follow instructions and execute tasks efficiently
	Good communication skills
	Basic proficiency in Microsoft Office (Word, Excel)
	Must be reliable and onsite.


Salary
N100,000 / month (with training provided).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Administrative Assistant (HR and Office)" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Experience Account Officer",
  "description": "Consulting and Biz Solutions Limited is one of the leading accounting firms providing financial services to individuals and businesses. We are seeking a skilled Sales Executive to join our team and drive our marketing efforts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experience Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Journal Entries: Posting and processing journal entries to ensure all business transactions are accurately recorded
	Accounts Receivable: Updating accounts receivable and issuing invoices to clients
	Accounts Payable: Updating accounts payable and performing reconciliations to ensure accuracy
	Financial Statements: Assisting in the preparation of balance sheets, income statements, and other financial statements in accordance with legal and company accounting guidelines
	Expense Review: Reviewing expenses, payroll records, and other assigned tasks to ensure accuracy and compliance
	Financial Data Management: Updating financial data in databases to ensure accuracy and timely availability of information
	Reporting: Preparing and submitting weekly and monthly reports to management
	Month-End/Year-End Closings: Assisting senior accountants in the preparation of monthly and yearly closings
	Special Projects: Assisting with other accounting projects as assigned by management


Requirements
To be considered for the position of an experienced accountant, the following requirements must be met:


	Professional Certification: Possession of a professional certification such as ACA, ACCA, or CIMA
	Minimum Experience: At least 5 years of experience in accounting, preferably in a similar industry or role


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in accounting software such as SAP, Oracle, or QuickBooks
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and laws, including tax laws and financial reporting requirements
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	Education: A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting or a related field


Key Skills:


	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Ability to work accurately and efficiently in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team


Additional Requirements:


	Strong knowledge of financial planning and budgeting
	Experience with financial analysis and reporting

Experience Account Officer Job at Consulting and Biz Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Consulting and Biz Solutions Limited is one of the leading accounting firms providing financial services to individuals and businesses. We are seeking a skilled Sales Executive to join our team and drive our marketing efforts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experience Account Officer

Job Location: Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Journal Entries: Posting and processing journal entries to ensure all business transactions are accurately recorded
	Accounts Receivable: Updating accounts receivable and issuing invoices to clients
	Accounts Payable: Updating accounts payable and performing reconciliations to ensure accuracy
	Financial Statements: Assisting in the preparation of balance sheets, income statements, and other financial statements in accordance with legal and company accounting guidelines
	Expense Review: Reviewing expenses, payroll records, and other assigned tasks to ensure accuracy and compliance
	Financial Data Management: Updating financial data in databases to ensure accuracy and timely availability of information
	Reporting: Preparing and submitting weekly and monthly reports to management
	Month-End/Year-End Closings: Assisting senior accountants in the preparation of monthly and yearly closings
	Special Projects: Assisting with other accounting projects as assigned by management


Requirements
To be considered for the position of an experienced accountant, the following requirements must be met:


	Professional Certification: Possession of a professional certification such as ACA, ACCA, or CIMA
	Minimum Experience: At least 5 years of experience in accounting, preferably in a similar industry or role


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in accounting software such as SAP, Oracle, or QuickBooks
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and laws, including tax laws and financial reporting requirements
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	Education: A Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or a related field


Key Skills:


	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Ability to work accurately and efficiently in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team


Additional Requirements:


	Strong knowledge of financial planning and budgeting
	Experience with financial analysis and reporting
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information


Preferred Qualifications:


	Master's Degree: A Master's Degree in Accounting or a related field
	Specialized Certifications: Possession of specialized certifications such as CFA or CPA
	Industry Experience: Experience working in a similar industry or role
	Leadership Experience: Experience leading a team or supervising staff


Salary
N120,000 - N350,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
